channel.title: fitgreenmind TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from fitgreenmind

item.title: MANGO STICKY OATS 🥭 This is an ode to Khao Niew Mamuang aka mango sticky rice… I love it SOOO much and this breakfast version tastes ALMOST like the original. 😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time): Base: -1/4 cup (30-40g) oats (or I used spelt flakes) -
item.description: MANGO STICKY OATS 🥭 This is an ode to Khao Niew Mamuang aka mango sticky rice… I love it SOOO much and this breakfast version tastes ALMOST like the original. 😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time): Base: -1/4 cup (30-40g) oats (or I used spelt flakes) -

item.title: How to find friends un your 20s? Help your girl out🥹🤝 #stuttgart #foodie #foodtok #movingout
item.description: How to find friends un your 20s? Help your girl out🥹🤝 #stuttgart #foodie #foodtok #movingout

item.title: I would like to disagree but apparently EVERY dish is a soup, sandwich or salad?!😭 #foodtok #foodie #veganfood
item.description: I would like to disagree but apparently EVERY dish is a soup, sandwich or salad?!😭 #foodtok #foodie #veganfood

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) Plant-based Tapas 😋 Ich habe in meinem Film “Better than Beef”, (den ihr euch DEFINITIV in der @ardmediathek ansehen solltet 😉) diese Tapas für @reneadler gemacht… Mein Ziel: ein ähnliches Geschmackserlebnis mit plant-based Albondigas, Torti
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) Plant-based Tapas 😋 Ich habe in meinem Film “Better than Beef”, (den ihr euch DEFINITIV in der @ardmediathek ansehen solltet 😉) diese Tapas für @reneadler gemacht… Mein Ziel: ein ähnliches Geschmackserlebnis mit plant-based Albondigas, Torti

item.title: I swear my mom knows EVERYTHING about EVERYTHING! 😭🙏 (actually I just wanted to hear her opinion about filming from this angle lol) #foodtok #vegan #recipes
item.description: I swear my mom knows EVERYTHING about EVERYTHING! 😭🙏 (actually I just wanted to hear her opinion about filming from this angle lol) #foodtok #vegan #recipes

item.title: The world’s best breakfast (in my opinion) 🤭 The perfect combination of cold and warm and here’s how to make it in 10mins: -base: your favorite porridge -vegan vanilla yogurt -defrosted blueberries -granola -peanut butter And that’s it! 😋 - Das WELTBESTE
item.description: The world’s best breakfast (in my opinion) 🤭 The perfect combination of cold and warm and here’s how to make it in 10mins: -base: your favorite porridge -vegan vanilla yogurt -defrosted blueberries -granola -peanut butter And that’s it! 😋 - Das WELTBESTE

item.title: Don’t forget: life is here to be lived! Have a nice day and enjoy the little things 🫶 #quote #hustleculture #inpiration
item.description: Don’t forget: life is here to be lived! Have a nice day and enjoy the little things 🫶 #quote #hustleculture #inpiration

item.title: The BEST and EASIEST way to eat a block of tofu (and eat enough protein)!😉💪 RECIPE (1-2 servings, 10min prep time): -1 block (200g) firm tofu Crumble in a pan with some hot oil and fry for 3-4mins until slightly browned. -1 Tbsp tomato paste -2 Tsp dark s
item.description: The BEST and EASIEST way to eat a block of tofu (and eat enough protein)!😉💪 RECIPE (1-2 servings, 10min prep time): -1 block (200g) firm tofu Crumble in a pan with some hot oil and fry for 3-4mins until slightly browned. -1 Tbsp tomato paste -2 Tsp dark s

item.title: I can’t do much but I can eat peas (and you can too) 🫛🫶. RECIPE pea-mint salad (2 servings, 10min prep time) -300g frozen green peas Defrost them in a pot. -a handful fresh mint -1/2 cucumber Finely chop everything. Add the peas, cucumber and mint to a bo
item.description: I can’t do much but I can eat peas (and you can too) 🫛🫶. RECIPE pea-mint salad (2 servings, 10min prep time) -300g frozen green peas Defrost them in a pot. -a handful fresh mint -1/2 cucumber Finely chop everything. Add the peas, cucumber and mint to a bo

item.title: I’m making a MOVE (literally haha)! 2024 I moved out for the first time, just so I could move back home one year later because it was ALLLL too much. At that point I thought “nope living alone isn’t for me! Too much responsibility, I cat find any friends,

item.title: Whipped male tahini butter 🧈 I craved it, I made it and I’m in love! 😋 I bet this butter is also super good as frosting or on pancakes… 🥞 RECIPE (10min prep time): -90g vegan butter, room temperature -2 Tbsp maple syrup -2 Tbsp tahini -a good pinch of
item.description: Whipped male tahini butter 🧈 I craved it, I made it and I’m in love! 😋 I bet this butter is also super good as frosting or on pancakes… 🥞 RECIPE (10min prep time): -90g vegan butter, room temperature -2 Tbsp maple syrup -2 Tbsp tahini -a good pinch of

item.title: I love my tofu…🥹 Tofu doesn’t like anything and that’s GREAT because that way we can sneak it into tortillas and make them high protein! 😎 RECIPE (4 wraps, 25min prep time): -200g silken tofu tofu -250g flour -salt to taste -1 Tsp baking powder Knead unt
item.description: I love my tofu…🥹 Tofu doesn’t like anything and that’s GREAT because that way we can sneak it into tortillas and make them high protein! 😎 RECIPE (4 wraps, 25min prep time): -200g silken tofu tofu -250g flour -salt to taste -1 Tsp baking powder Knead unt

item.title: Do you want the recipe…? 😋 #tofu #crispytofu #foodtok
item.description: Do you want the recipe…? 😋 #tofu #crispytofu #foodtok

item.title: Antwort auf @jajadejau Extra CRISPY tofu 😍 I tell you I haven’t made a crispier tofu yet and it’s SO EASY to get that result! 😋 Thanks to @thehungrywarrior for the rice paper inspo! 😉 RECIPE (1 servings, 25min prep time): -200g tofu, cut into 8 sticks W
item.description: Antwort auf @jajadejau Extra CRISPY tofu 😍 I tell you I haven’t made a crispier tofu yet and it’s SO EASY to get that result! 😋 Thanks to @thehungrywarrior for the rice paper inspo! 😉 RECIPE (1 servings, 25min prep time): -200g tofu, cut into 8 sticks W
